name: Bottomless Run Frisk
description:
Frisk, after the same boring runs through the underground, was about to give up on resetting. But… she finds a difference in this last run, as her pants get snagged and torn on the way down into the underground, which creates a whole new experience for her and the monsters. Though, it seems another human has appeared in the underground, interestingly…

Full credit to Shimoto Zukafu for their amazing artwork and the Bottomless Frisk and Chara series.
creator: TheMightyOlive123
